title: Meliosma obtusifolia
taxonomy: Meliosma obtusifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Sabiaceae. It is native to China and Taiwan. The plant belongs to the genus Meliosma, which is a group of flowering plants that are widely distributed in East Asia. Meliosma obtusifolia is further classified as a member of the order Proteales. Within the order Proteales, Meliosma obtusifolia is placed in the family Sabiaceae.

intro: Meliosma obtusifolia, also known as the Chinese Meliosma, is a plant species native to China, belonging to the family Sabiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, providing relief from various health issues such as pain, fever, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Meliosma obtusifolia include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
